zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk II Paynel of Bampton於大約1150年出生在法國布列塔尼時，他的父親Foulques Paynel of Bampton32歲，母親Lesceline de Subligny22歲。他去世於1215年6月25日享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulk II Paynel of Bampton于大约1150年出生在法国布列塔尼时，他的父亲Foulques Paynel of Bampton32岁，母亲Lesceline de Subligny22岁。他去世于1215年6月25日享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Paynel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk II Paynel of Bampton was born about 1150, in Brittany, France, his father, Foulques Paynel of Bampton, was 32 and his mother, Lesceline de Subligny, was 22. He died on 25 June 1215, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk II Paynel of Bampton est né environ 1150, à Bretagne, France, son père, Foulques Paynel of Bampton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lesceline de Subligny, avait 22 ans. Il est décédé le 25 juin 1215, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulk II Paynel of Bampton um 1150 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Foulques Paynel of Bampton 32 und seine Mutter Lesceline de Subligny 22. Er starb am 25. Juni 1215 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk II Paynel of Bampton è nato il circa 1150 nel Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Foulques Paynel of Bampton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lesceline de Subligny, aveva 22 anni. Morì il 25 giugno 1215, all'età di 66 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Fulk II Paynel of Bampton(이)가 대략 1150년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Foulques Paynel of Bampton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lesceline de Subligny(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1215년 6월 25일 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk II Paynel of Bampton nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Foulques Paynel of Bampton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lesceline de Subligny, tinha 22 anos. Ele faleceu em 25 de junho de 1215, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk II Paynel of Bampton родился около 1150 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Foulques Paynel of Bampton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lesceline de Subligny, 22. Он умер 25 июня 1215 г. в возрасте 66 лет.
